title: Princess Diana
questions: What do you remember about Diana when she was alive?
Did you feel sorry for her?

Do you think she was a force for great good in the world?
Can you remember what you felt when you heard the news she had died?
Diana's brother said she had been hunted by the paparazzi. What do you think of the journalists who followed her everywhere?
Do you think she deserves a sainthood for the causes she worked for?
Do you think Diana was the perfect modern-day princess?
What do you think Diana felt about the British Royal family?
Do you have a favourite image of photo of Diana
Do you think she really was the people's princess and the Queen of Hearts?

Do you think Diana's death was simply a tragic accident?
